tests.scenario: Check if pricing info is shown on subscription page
steps: Open app as a free user
Look at what info is displayed
tests.expected_result: Price, billing cycle, renewal date and how to cancel should all be visible on the page.

tests.scenario: Check billing terms shown during trial signup
steps: Start signing up for free trial
Check what terms are shown before confirming
tests.expected_result: Trial length, what happens after trial ends, and the price after trial should be shown clearly before you confirm.

tests.scenario: Try cancelling subscription from settings
steps: Log in with a subscribed account
Look for cancel option and tap it
tests.expected_result: There should be a cancel button that works inside the app. It shouldnt send you to a browser or google play.

tests.scenario: Try cancelling free trial from settings
steps: Log in with account on free trial
tests.expected_result: Trial gets cancelled in the app and you get a message saying you wont be charged.

tests.scenario: Cancel trial early and check if you get charged
steps: Cancel it a few days before it ends
Wait until trial period is over
tests.expected_result: No charge shows up. Account goes back to free version.

tests.scenario: Cancel trial same day and check charges
steps: Cancel it right away same day
Check if any money was taken
tests.expected_result: Still no charge even if you cancel day one.

tests.scenario: Play a full meditation without crashes
steps: Hit play and let it run all the way through
tests.expected_result: Meditation plays start to finish, no crash no freeze no random stopping.

tests.scenario: Play sleepcast with screen locked
steps: Open app and pick a sleepcast
Hit play then lock the phone
tests.expected_result: Sleepcast keeps playing in background without stopping or crashing.

tests.scenario: How fast does a session load on wifi
steps: Open app and pick a session
Tap play and count how long it takes to start
tests.expected_result: Audio should start playing within about 5 seconds.

tests.scenario: How fast does a session load on data
steps: Turn off wifi use mobile data
Open app and pick a session
tests.expected_result: Should still start within 5 seconds if you have decent signal.

tests.scenario: Does the app still work after updating
steps: Use the app normally and note how it performs
tests.expected_result: App works the same or better. No new crashes or noticeably slower loading.

tests.scenario: Check if features break after update
steps: Before updating write down what features work
Go through each feature and test it
tests.expected_result: Everything that worked before should still work after.

tests.scenario: Play downloaded meditation in airplane mode
steps: Download a meditation while on wifi
tests.expected_result: It plays fine. No buffering errors no 'you are offline' messages.

tests.scenario: Play downloaded sleepcast with no connection
steps: Turn off both wifi and data
Open app and play the sleepcast
tests.expected_result: Sleepcast plays all the way through without trying to connect to internet.

tests.scenario: Check if downloads survive an update
steps: Go to downloads section and check
tests.expected_result: All 3 sessions still there and still playable.

tests.scenario: Downloaded stuff still works offline after update
steps: Try playing one of the old downloads
tests.expected_result: Downloaded session plays offline even after the update. No need to redownload.

tests.scenario: Get to sleep content from home screen
steps: Open app (should be on home screen)
Try to get to sleep content
Count how many taps it takes
tests.expected_result: Should take 3 taps max to get to the sleep content list.

tests.scenario: Get to meditation section from home
tests.expected_result: 3 taps or less to reach meditation listings.

tests.scenario: Search for a specific session by name
steps: Type in name of a session you know exists
tests.expected_result: That session shows up near the top of results.

tests.scenario: Search using a keyword like sleep or stress
tests.expected_result: Results are actually related to what you searched for.

tests.scenario: Check if each category has enough content
steps: Check stress, sleep, focus, mindfulness sections
Count how many sessions in each
tests.expected_result: At least 10 sessions in each category.

tests.scenario: Try playing something from each category
steps: Pick one session from stress category and play it
Pick one from sleep and play it
Do same for focus and mindfulness
tests.expected_result: All 4 sessions play without issues.

tests.scenario: Check if completed sessions show up in history
steps: Go to profile or progress section
tests.expected_result: Completed sessions show up with names and dates.

tests.scenario: Check if streak counter works
steps: Do at least one session per day for 3 days
tests.expected_result: Streak shows 3 days. Activity for each day is visible.
